sourcesContent:
const translations = {
  en: {
    nav: {
      home: 'Home',
      about: 'About',
      skills: 'Skills',
      projects: 'Projects',
      education: 'Education',
      activities: 'Activities',
      experience: 'Experience',
      contact: 'Contact'
    },
    hero: {
      greeting: 'Hello, I am',
      name: 'Lavisy RANDRIANTSALAMA',
      role: 'AI & Data Scientist',
      downloadCV: 'Download CV',
      contact: 'Get In Touch'
    },
    about: {
      title: 'About Me',
      subtitle: 'What I Do :',
      description: 'I am a mid-level data scientist specialized in:',
      services: [
        'Data Analysis and Visualization',
        'Train & Finetune ML Models',
        'ERP / BI Reporting',
        'Predicting and solving any complex problems with AI & data-driven solutions'
      ]
    },
    skills: {
      title: 'Skills',
      subtitle: 'Technical Stack',
      conceptsLabel: 'Concepts',
      toolsLabel: 'Tools',
      showMore: 'Show 3 more',
      showLess: 'Show less',
      categories: [
        {
          emoji: '\uD83E\uDDE0',
          name: 'AI Engineering',
          concepts: ['LLM Applications', 'Prompt Design', 'RAG', 'AI Automation', 'Model Evaluation', 'Inference Pipelines'],
          tools: ['OpenAI API', 'LangChain', 'Hugging Face', 'Python', 'FastAPI', 'Vector DB']
        },
        {
          emoji: '\uD83D\uDCCA',
          name: 'BI & Data Analytics',
          concepts: ['Dashboarding', 'KPI Tracking', 'Business Reporting', 'Storytelling', 'A/B Testing', 'Data Modeling'],
          tools: ['Power BI', 'Tableau', 'Looker Studio', 'Excel', 'SQL', 'DAX']
        },
        {
          emoji: '\u2699\uFE0F',
          name: 'Machine Learning',
          concepts: ['Supervised Learning', 'Unsupervised Learning', 'Feature Engineering', 'Model Tuning', 'Classification', 'Regression'],
          tools: ['Scikit-learn', 'XGBoost', 'LightGBM', 'TensorFlow', 'PyTorch', 'MLflow']
        },
        {
          emoji: '\u2601\uFE0F',
          name: 'Cloud & MLOps',
          concepts: ['Deployment', 'CI/CD', 'Model Monitoring', 'Experiment Tracking', 'Containerization', 'Scalable APIs'],
          tools: ['AWS', 'Docker', 'Kubernetes', 'GitHub Actions', 'Airflow', 'Linux']
        },
        {
          emoji: '\uD83D\uDCF1',
          name: 'Backend & Mobile Development',
          concepts: ['REST API', 'Authentication', 'Responsive UI', 'State Management', 'CRUD Systems', 'Integration'],
          tools: ['Node.js', 'Express', 'React', 'React Native', 'JavaScript', 'TypeScript']
        },
        {
          emoji: '\uD83D\uDD2C',
          name: 'Data Science',
          concepts: ['EDA', 'Statistical Testing', 'Time Series', 'Forecasting', 'Data Cleaning', 'Insight Generation'],
          tools: ['Pandas', 'NumPy', 'Matplotlib', 'Seaborn', 'SciPy', 'Jupyter']
        }
      ],
    },
    projects: {
      title: 'Projects',
      subtitle: 'Recent Work',
      taglineLabel: 'Tagline:',
      stackLabel: 'Technical stack',
      viewOnGithub: 'View on GitHub',
      viewDemo: 'Live Demo',
      showMore: 'Show more',
      showLess: 'Show less',
      items: [
        {
          title: 'Customer Churn Prediction',
          category: 'Machine Learning',
          tagline: 'Reduced customer attrition risk by turning churn signals into actionable retention insights.',
          description: 'Built a predictive model to identify at-risk customers with 94% accuracy using ensemble methods. Implemented feature engineering pipeline and deployed model as REST API.',
          metrics: [
            { value: '94%', label: 'model accuracy' },
            { value: '-28%', label: 'estimated churn risk' }
          ],
          technologies: ['Python', 'Scikit-learn', 'XGBoost', 'FastAPI'],
          images: ['/projects/churn-1.jpg', '/projects/churn-2.jpg'],
          github: 'https://github.com/username/churn-prediction',
          demo: ''
        },
        {
          title: 'Sales Forecasting Dashboard',
          category: 'Data Visualization',
          tagline: 'Turned raw sales data into a decision-ready dashboard for faster business reporting.',
          description: 'Interactive Power BI dashboard for real-time sales analytics and forecasting. Includes drill-down capabilities and automated reporting.',
          metrics: [
            { value: 'Real-time', label: 'sales monitoring' },
            { value: '-60%', label: 'manual reporting time' }
          ],
          technologies: ['Power BI', 'SQL', 'Python', 'DAX'],
          images: ['/projects/sales-1.jpg', '/projects/sales-2.jpg'],
          github: '',
          demo: ''
        },
        {
          title: 'Sentiment Analysis API',
          category: 'NLP / Deep Learning',
          tagline: 'Scaled text intelligence into a production-ready API for daily sentiment monitoring.',
          description: 'REST API for sentiment analysis using BERT, processing 10K+ reviews daily. Fine-tuned model achieves 92% accuracy on domain-specific data.',
          metrics: [
            { value: '10K+', label: 'reviews per day' },
            { value: '92%', label: 'domain accuracy' }
          ],
          technologies: ['Python', 'PyTorch', 'Hugging Face', 'FastAPI', 'Docker'],
          images: ['/projects/sentiment-1.jpg', '/projects/sentiment-2.jpg'],
          github: 'https://github.com/username/sentiment-api',
          demo: ''
        },
        {
          title: 'Fraud Detection System',
          category: 'Machine Learning',
          tagline: 'Improved transaction security with a real-time fraud scoring pipeline.',
          description: 'Real-time fraud detection pipeline reducing fraudulent transactions by 67%. Uses anomaly detection and gradient boosting for high precision.',
          metrics: [
            { value: '-67%', label: 'fraudulent transactions' },
            { value: 'Real-time', label: 'risk scoring' }
          ],
          technologies: ['Python', 'LightGBM', 'Kafka', 'PostgreSQL'],
          images: ['/projects/fraud-1.jpg', '/projects/fraud-2.jpg'],
          github: 'https://github.com/username/fraud-detection',
          demo: ''
        },
        {
          title: 'Image Classification',
          category: 'Computer Vision',
          tagline: 'Raised quality control reliability with high-accuracy visual classification.',
          description: 'CNN-based image classifier for quality control in manufacturing. Achieves 98% accuracy with data augmentation techniques.',
          metrics: [
            { value: '98%', label: 'classification accuracy' },
            { value: '24/7', label: 'inspection readiness' }
          ],
          technologies: ['Python', 'TensorFlow', 'OpenCV', 'Streamlit'],
          images: ['/projects/image-1.jpg', '/projects/image-2.jpg'],
          github: '',
          demo: ''
        },
        {
          title: 'Recommendation Engine',
          category: 'Machine Learning',
          tagline: 'Boosted engagement with a hybrid recommendation engine tuned for relevance.',
          description: 'Collaborative filtering system increasing user engagement by 35%. Combines content-based and collaborative approaches for hybrid recommendations.',
          metrics: [
            { value: '+35%', label: 'user engagement' },
            { value: 'Hybrid', label: 'recommendation logic' }
          ],
          technologies: ['Python', 'Scikit-learn', 'Surprise', 'Flask'],
          images: ['/projects/reco-1.jpg', '/projects/reco-2.jpg'],
          github: 'https://github.com/username/recommendation-engine',
          demo: ''
        }
      ]
    },

          },

        },
        {

          mainCourses: ['Algorithms', 'Database Systems', 'Statistics', 'Software Engineering']
        }
      ],
      certifications: [
        { title: 'AWS Machine Learning Specialty', issuer: 'Amazon Web Services', year: '2023', url: '/assets/certifications/aws-ml.pdf' },
